title: Insurance Coverage Gap Quiz - Are You Properly Protected? | CrunchMilk
metaDescription: Discover gaps in your insurance coverage with this free 8-question quiz. Assess your health, life, auto, home, and disability insurance protection levels.
tagline: Could one bad event financially devastate you?

questions.question: How comprehensive is your health insurance coverage?

options.text: I'm uninsured
I have a high-deductible plan with no HSA savings
I have a solid plan with reasonable copays and deductible
Comprehensive coverage with HSA/FSA funded and low out-of-pocket max

questions.question: Do you have life insurance, and does it cover enough?

options.text: No life insurance at all
Only what my employer provides (usually 1x salary)
I have a policy but haven't reviewed if the amount is sufficient
I have 10-12x my income in coverage, reviewed within the last 2 years

questions.question: Do you have disability insurance that would replace your income?

options.text: No disability coverage at all
Only short-term disability through my employer
Short-term and long-term disability through employer
Employer coverage plus supplemental private disability insurance

questions.question: How well does your auto insurance protect you?

options.text: Just minimum state-required liability
Basic coverage with low liability limits
Good coverage with 100/300 liability and collision/comprehensive
High liability limits, uninsured motorist, umbrella policy, and appropriate deductibles

questions.question: Do you have renter's or homeowner's insurance with adequate coverage?

options.text: No renter's/homeowner's insurance
Basic policy but I've never inventoried my belongings
Good policy with replacement cost coverage
Full replacement cost, documented inventory, and riders for valuables

questions.question: Do you have umbrella/excess liability insurance?

options.text: I don't know what that is
I've heard of it but don't have it
I've considered it but decided I don't need it yet
Yes, I carry an umbrella policy appropriate to my net worth

questions.question: When was the last time you reviewed and compared your insurance policies?

options.text: I haven't reviewed them since I signed up
More than 3 years ago
Within the last 1-3 years
I review and compare annually

questions.question: Are you covered for risks specific to your region (flood, earthquake, hurricane, wildfire)?

options.text: I don't know what risks are specific to my area
I know the risks but don't have specific coverage
I have some additional coverage but may have gaps
I've assessed my regional risks and have appropriate additional policies

scoreRanges.label: Significantly Exposed
scoreRanges.analysis: You have major gaps in your insurance coverage that could lead to financial devastation. Prioritize getting health insurance and basic liability coverage immediately. A single accident, illness, or lawsuit could wipe out your savings.

scoreRanges.label: Gaps to Fill
scoreRanges.analysis: You have some coverage but important gaps remain. Review your life insurance needs (especially if you have dependents), consider disability insurance, and check that your liability limits are adequate for your assets.

scoreRanges.label: Mostly Covered
scoreRanges.analysis: You're well-protected in most areas. Fine-tune by reviewing your deductibles, checking for regional risk gaps, and considering umbrella coverage if your net worth warrants it. Annual policy reviews will keep you current.

scoreRanges.label: Fully Protected
scoreRanges.analysis: Excellent insurance coverage across all major categories. You've built a comprehensive safety net. Continue your annual reviews to ensure coverage keeps pace with changes in your life, assets, and regional risks.
